content.en:
Ye Tian didn't watch the excitement outside, he came here to copy the spatial talent of the Void Giant Beast, so he had to enter the Void.

Void is a place where time and space are distorted, and there are many such places in the boundary river.

In the past, vanity was just an ordinary place.

But nowadays, the vain fame is much greater.

I saw Ye Tian step into the land of illusion and gradually go deeper into it.

Here, there are a large number of islands, surrounded by the sea of vanity, the sea of vain can give birth to the water of vain, the water of vain is not an ordinary treasure, its value is very high.

The Water of Void helps to refine the will, and if there is enough Water of Nothingness, it can even raise the will to the level of the eighth order.

If it were in an eternal realm like the Void Region, there would be no treasure like the Void Water at all.

It's a pity that it takes a long time for the water of vanity to give birth to a drop, and I don't know how long it will take to get a large amount of water of vain.

Rumble!!!!

Ahead, battle fluctuations are heard.

Just the fluctuating aura made Ye Tian dare not approach.

"It's definitely a battle of half-step eternal control realm combat power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The fight of such a strong man, a breath of 727 can bombard him, and the difference in strength between the two sides is too big.

Therefore, he did not continue to move forward, otherwise he would be affected, and the replica body would be directly annihilated.

Although he didn't care about this replica body, he hadn't copied the talent yet, so he naturally didn't want to fall like this.

After waiting for a while, the battle fluctuations stopped, and Ye Tian dared to approach.

Soon.

He came to the depths of the Void, where he perceived a sea of red, one of which was in the Sea of Void, and most of it was in another space-time warp.

This red ocean is obviously a newly born treasure land, and it is also the reason why many peak Legendary Realm lords have come here.

At this time, there were some peak Legendary Realm lords standing in this red sea, all of them were fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords, and I am afraid that there was not a fourth-level Peak Legendary Realm lord.

The fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord is too weak, and a single wave can kill him, so the fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord is qualified to come here, even if it is not half a step lower than the combat power of the Eternal Master, it will not be lost in an instant.

Regarding Ye Tian's arrival, the other peak Legendary Realm lords didn't care at all.

At the moment, they are all discussing and chatting.

"What should I do, three delusional beasts comparable to the combat power of a half-step Eternal Rewarder have entered the other end of this treasure, if we don't kill these three delusional beasts, we won't dare to go in!"

"Who killed? It is true that there are a few half-step eternal masters, but it is a pity that they have been fighting with the delusion giant beast for a while, regardless of each other, where can they be killed."

"The Eternal Masters are not coming here unless the opportunity here is of great benefit to the Eternal Master, but at the moment, there is no opportunity that would be of interest to the Eternal Master. "

"Just cultivate here, the sea water in this red sea has a tempering supreme legendary body, and cultivating here is also a good choice. "

"Hehe, you dare to cultivate here, not afraid that the vain giant beast will come out and swallow you in one bite?"

......

Ye Tian listened and roughly understood the situation.

This treasure land is indeed a rare opportunity, but the real opportunity is still at the other end, and there are vain beasts there, and there are three delusion beasts.

Moreover, there are also a few half-step eternal masters.

"The Delusion Behemoths are still there, I can copy their talents, no matter what, go in first. "

Ye Tian flew to another space-time warping place, which was the source of this Red Sea treasure land.

Seeing that Ye Tian also dared to break in, the other peak Legendary Realm lords couldn't help but secretly shake their heads.

"Another one who sent him to death, losing a doppelganger for nothing!"

In their opinion, there are many peak Legendary Realm lords like Ye Tian who have been sent to death, relying on being a clone, even if they fall, the main body will not fall, so they take risks to seek opportunities, but none of them will succeed.

Wow!

Ye Tian crossed over and came to the other end of the Red Sea Treasure Land.

As soon as he entered, he sensed three half-step Eternal Masters, as well as three huge Illusory Behemoths.

In addition, Ye Tian also sensed a red mountain, a red giant tree, running through the Red Sea Treasure Land, and the three half-step Eternal Masters were waiting on the red giant tree at the moment, confronting the Void Behemoth.

Ye Tian noticed that the red giant tree had red fruits, each red fruit was the size of a star, and it exuded strong energy fluctuations, it was definitely not an ordinary thing.

Ye Tian was shallow and didn't know this tree, but it was absolutely extraordinary, and the fruit was not ripe yet, otherwise the three half-step Eternal Masters would definitely not wait.

And although the wisdom of the three illusory beasts is not high, they also have some wisdom, and they fought with the half-step eternal master before, but they couldn't help the other party, so they didn't continue to do it.

However, as time passed, this place would attract more half-step Eternal Masters, and at that time, the three delusional beasts would have no choice but to flee from here.

Ye Tian's arrival attracted their attention, and one of the illusory giant beasts twisted its huge body, instantly came to Ye Tian's face, and slapped it over.

Airplanes!!!!

Time and space are stagnant, even Ye Tian is difficult to shake, unable to break free.

But at this moment, Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe the other party's talent.

Mastery Ancestor: Space!

Copy!

Ye Tian instantly copied the opponent's control-level space ancestor.

Then, his body was directly shattered by the other party.

For them, it's just crushing an ant, so they don't care.

......

Qinglian Giant City.

Ye Tian smiled slightly, he lost a copy body, but he gained a mastery-level space ancestral endowment, he could be said to have made a lot of money.

Although the Red Sea treasure land was of high value, it was not something he was currently eligible to participate in.

Right now, he just wants to copy some control-level ancestral endowments and then improve his cultivation strength, that's all.

"The mastery-level space ancestor is in hand, and then copy a mastery-level time ancestor, and that's it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed slowly, and about six realm river years had passed, and news came from the Void side, another great battle broke out over there, more than twenty half-step Eternal Masters fought each other, one Void Behemoth was killed, and the other two fled.

However, the half-step Eternal Controller did not fall, but the Red Sea Treasure Land was occupied by a half-step Eternal Controller called the Red Leaf Lord, and it is said that the strength of the other party is much stronger than the average half-step Eternal Master, and it is the son of a very powerful Eternal Master.

Therefore, the Red Leaf Lord occupied the Red Sea Treasure Land, and the other half-step Eternal Masters did not dare to refute it, and those Peak Legendary Realm Lords naturally had no opinion. _
